Data Catalog Requirements Pre-construction survey for nesting raptors and other migratory birds during nesting season

Pre-construction survey for nesting raptors and other migratory birds during nesting season

MM-BIO-2

Pre-construction survey for nesting raptors and other migratory birds during nesting season

Survey

Requirement

Prior to ground-disturbing activities, a qualified biologist shall complete pre-construction survey for nesting raptors and other migratory birds during nesting season within the project area and submit findings to the City.

Resource Category
Biological Resources
Type
Survey
Phase
Pre-Construction
Frequency
One-time
Milestone
Building Permit
Species
Nesting raptors, Migratory birds
Season
Feb 1 – Aug 31
Construction activity
Ground disturbance, Vegetation removal
Responsible party
Environmental Lead
Expected evidence
Survey report (PDF)

Reference Files

Details
Default Assignee Sarah Kim
Scope Project Streamlined requirements are always project-scoped
Timing
Deadline 14 days before milestone One-time — single implementation, single due date
Notifications
  • Coming up 7 days before due
  • Due On the due date
  • Past due 1 day after due
Pre-construction survey for nesting raptors and other migratory birds during nesting season Survey

Prior to ground-disturbing activities, a qualified biologist shall complete pre-construction survey for nesting raptors and other migratory birds during nesting season within the project area and submit findings to the City.

MM-BIO-2 3600 Alameda Avenue Project FEIR
Streamlined requirements are one-time — a single implementation with a single due date. Frequency and recurrence are not available.
Reference Files

Additional Recipients

Notifications are sent to the assignee. Add additional recipients here to also receive notifications.

Due Date

May 18, 2026

Notification times below are calculated relative to this date. The due date is edited in Project Tracking.

Default: 7 days
